{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260323050629AFE832B38517BFA25EB1"}"},"total":133},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7580803029432992574","common":{"comment_type":21,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"这本书真的挺好看的，秦天和雪儿的父女情很感人，内容也很友趣，雪儿超可爱的，唯一就是希望秦天复婚，必竞按剧情讲顾寒霜对秦天也是有感情的，也是真心希望两人在一起。 @青山一梦m","text_exts":[{"e":86,"s":80,"text":"","tp":2,"uri":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N0ZdbQullH/VQ/W+fObFqsCm8SD1DX1VUDqzm29QeUbb"}]},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1765047396,"group_id":"7568755489421397016","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"闪耀星辰，照亮人生。","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N48K8kooeX+RqCq26CGAnrzIs+EzuIRMm5kGWruHG65w","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":1,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/518182016443442e9411caaeff83b91b~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776790044&x-signature=DxiwUKpe9AUaRD%2BbyoEbAFzP%2BOM%3D","user_id":"3836642535146679","user_name":"星辰及我不及她"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"3836642535146679","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7568755489421397016","book_info":{"abstract":"【萌娃】【美食】【摆摊】【日常】
五年前的一个夜晚，秦天和顾寒霜因为意外，发生了关系。
次日，顾寒霜将1万块钱丢到秦天脸上，并让他滚。
本以为事情就这么结束，谁知一年后！
看着顾寒霜抱着一个奶团子来到公司，秦天人都麻了。
两人奉子成婚。
却并非是幸福的一家三口。
三年后！
看着手中的离婚证，秦天微微一笑，仿佛脱离了某种束缚。
开始了带娃摆摊生活。","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/cd64a5a14e0020f87f28bf7e565a6945","author":"青山一梦m","author_id":"","book_id":"7568755489421397016","book_name":"和冰山总裁离婚后，我带娃摆摊","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#181008","creation_status":"1","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"6.8万人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":262,"name":"都市脑洞","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=262&name=都市脑洞&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":1,"name":"都市","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=1&name=都市&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":19,"name":"系统","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=19&name=系统&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":42,"name":"奶爸","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=42&name=奶爸&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":78,"name":"美食","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=78&name=美食&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7568755535378383384","read_count":"67736","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"756962"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"7.6","serial_count":"368","tags":"都市脑洞,都市,系统,奶爸,美食","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/92957327709bddf727a692c02d73494f~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779397589&x-signature=nXR2q6tu705j1qnPIthtLTMlXHs%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"2981472178278231","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"76"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260323050629AFE832B38517BFA25EB1"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读2小时后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":20,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_duration":0,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":7395,"reply_count":14,"show_pv":51494},"user_action":{"author":0,"is_author_stick":false,"stick_
